ddls:
CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date the game was played */,
  "season" INTEGER /* Season in which the game was played */,
  "game_status_text" TEXT /* Status of the game (e.g., Final) */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "visitor_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the visitor team */,
  "home_team_wins" INTEGER /* Indicator of whether the home team won (1) or lost (0) */,
  "game_type_id" INTEGER /* Type of the game (e.g., regular season, playoffs) */,
  "game_outcome_id" INTEGER /* Outcome of the game (e.g., win, loss) */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators at the game */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Name of the venue where the game was played */,
  "overtime" INTEGER /* Indicates if the game went into overtime */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_game_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_type_id") REFERENCES game_types ("game_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_game_outcome_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_outcome_id") REFERENCES game_outcomes ("game_outcome_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_visitor_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("visitor_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Full name of the team */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the team name */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference to which the team belongs */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division to which the team belongs */,
  "founded" TEXT /* Year the team was founded */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team's current coach */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the team's home stadium */,
  "stadium_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the team's home stadium */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_game_stats" (
  "team_game_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team's game statistics */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "pts" INTEGER /* Points scored by the team */,
  "fg_pct" REAL /* Field goal percentage of the team */,
  "ft_pct" REAL /* Free throw percentage of the team */,
  "fg3_pct" REAL /* Three-point field goal percentage of the team */,
  "ast" INTEGER /* Assists made by the team */,
  "reb" INTEGER /* Total rebounds made by the team */,
  "def_reb" INTEGER /* Defensive rebounds made by the team */,
  "off_reb" INTEGER /* Offensive rebounds made by the team */,
  "steals" INTEGER /* Steals made by the team */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Blocks made by the team */,
  "turnovers" INTEGER /* Turnovers by the team */,
  "fouls" INTEGER /* Fouls committed by the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_game_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_game_stats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_game_stats_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position played by the player */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Weight of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player is currently playing for */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_pick" INTEGER /* Draft pick number */,
  "college" TEXT /* College the player attended */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Player's date of birth */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Player's nationality */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_game_stats" (
  "player_game_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player's game statistics */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "pts" INTEGER /* Points scored by the player */,
  "fg" INTEGER /* Field goals made by the player */,
  "ft" INTEGER /* Free throws made by the player */,
  "fg3" INTEGER /* Three-point field goals made by the player */,
  "ast" INTEGER /* Assists made by the player */,
  "reb" INTEGER /* Rebounds made by the player */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Minutes played by the player */,
  "steals" INTEGER /* Steals made by the player */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Blocks made by the player */,
  "turnovers" INTEGER /* Turnovers by the player */,
  "fouls" INTEGER /* Fouls committed by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_game_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_game_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_game_stats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_year" INTEGER /* Year of the season */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "num_teams" INTEGER /* Number of teams participating in the season */,
  "champion_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the champion team for the season */,
  "mvp_player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the MVP player for the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_types" (
  "game_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game type */,
  "game_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the game type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_outcomes" (
  "game_outcome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game outcome */,
  "game_outcome_name" TEXT /* Name of the game outcome */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_outcome_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., fan, analyst, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_game_access" (
  "user_game_access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user's game access */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the game */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the game was accessed */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the user's access to the game data (in minutes) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_game_access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_game_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_game_access_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_standings" (
  "team_standing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team's standing */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses */,
  "pct" REAL /* Win percentage */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the team in the standings */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Number of games played by the team */,
  "games_won" INTEGER /* Number of games won by the team */,
  "games_lost" INTEGER /* Number of games lost by the team */,
  "games_tied" INTEGER /* Number of games tied by the team */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Total points earned by the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_standing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_standings_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_standings_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_standings" (
  "player_standing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player's standing */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "pts" INTEGER /* Points scored by the player */,
  "fg" INTEGER /* Field goals made by the player */,
  "ft" INTEGER /* Free throws made by the player */,
  "fg3" INTEGER /* Three-point field goals made by the player */,
  "ast" INTEGER /* Assists made by the player */,
  "reb" INTEGER /* Rebounds made by the player */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the player in the standings */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Number of games played by the player */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Total minutes played by the player */,
  "field_goal_attempts" INTEGER /* Total field goal attempts by the player */,
  "free_throw_attempts" INTEGER /* Total free throw attempts by the player */,
  "three_point_attempts" INTEGER /* Total three-point field goal attempts by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_standing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_standings_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_standings_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team receiving the award */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player receiving the award */,
  "award_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the award type */,
  "date_awarded" TEXT /* Date the award was given */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_awards_award_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("award_type_id") REFERENCES award_types ("award_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_awards_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_awards_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_awards_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "award_types" (
  "award_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award type */,
  "award_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the award type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_type_id")
)
